title: × reyllopia conollyana
intro: × Reyllopia conollyana, also known as Conolly's reyllopia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Diapensiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of × Reyllopia conollyana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is typically consumed after being extracted with water or other solvents.
